creator: ache@nagual.ru
text:
> >Synopsis:       fetchmail doesn't rewrite multi-line RFC-822 headers correctly

I think this sort of errors must be reported directly to fetchmail maintainer,
not to FreeBSD pr database. It is definitely not porter mistake and probably
nobody here want to be actively involved in fetchmail development.

-- 
Andrey A. Chernov
<ache@nagual.ru>
